name: mtien-solution-root
description: Devtools-only root for Husky/lint-staged. BE/ and FE/ remain independent Next.js apps.

scripts.lint: npm --prefix BE run lint && npm --prefix FE run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix BE run typecheck && npm --prefix FE run typecheck
scripts.format: npm --prefix BE run format && npm --prefix FE run format
